final:
// // This module counts down from 15 to 0 on the rising edge of the clock when enabled.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (enable) begin
        if (Q == 4'b1111) begin
            Q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            Q <= Q + 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module counts down from 15 to 0 on the rising edge of the clock when enabled.
